description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, averaging 1 hr 2 mins per day. His work was mainly in Java, with some time in Markdown and other languages. The activity data shows work across 3 projects, but it does not list any repository names.
